title: Bothriochloa longipaniculata
taxonomy: Bothriochloa longipaniculata is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Andropogoneae. The genus Bothriochloa is classified under the subfamily Panicoideae and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions. Bothriochloa longipaniculata is a type of perennial grass that grows in dense tufts. This species is often used as a pasture plant and for soil stabilization in various parts of the world.
